chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Transfer Appln.No.S-79 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.7112/2021 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.7113/2021 (E/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 15.11.2021 Applicant Khadim Hussain Shaikh in person. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency Granted. 2 to 4. It is contended by the applicant/ complainant that he is not able to understand the proceedings of his case, which are being conducted in “Urdu”, by learned 4th Additional Sessions Judge, Dadu, therefore, his case be transferred to other Judge, for its disposal according to law. The ground advanced by the applicant is not justifying the transfer of his case from one to other Court. Consequently, the instant criminal transfer application is dismissed in limine, with an advice to the applicant to engage the counsel for understanding the proceedings of his case. J U D G E
